channel.title: The Convergence Codex
channel.description: Comparative eschatology research on Al-Mahdi, Dajjal, the Biblical Antichrist, the False Prophet, and related end-times texts.

item.title: Mahdi vs Antichrist: Comparative Research Map
item.description: A focused page comparing Al-Mahdi and the Biblical Antichrist across Biblical, Islamic, and secular lenses.

item.title: Antichrist in the Bible
item.description: A guide to the Biblical texts behind Antichrist, Beast, and man of lawlessness language.

item.title: Gog and Magog in the Bible and Quran
item.description: The shared-name parallel across Ezekiel, Revelation, Quran, and Islamic hadith.
